channel.description: Thread: Testing & Formal Verification Working draft for faculty review. A spiral deepens through escalating passes across blocks. This is the spiral; one of nine spirals (alongside three lenses and one bounded practice). In one line: Informal pre/post-condition reasoning → regression discipline → testing AND formal verification, named and contrasted. Character Expanded to dual-track testing and formal verification (not collapsed into ’testing’). The two are different skills — testing checks specific cases, verification reasons about all cases. Practice precedes formal naming, as with the rest of the spiral approach.
